seo.title: MyGamingTips — Your best gaming content, sorted and verified.
seo.description: MyGamingTips gathers useful gaming videos, guides and links, organized by game and verified by the community. Free, ad-free. Mobile + Windows.

brand.name: MyGamingTips
brand.tagline: Your best gaming content, sorted and verified.

hero.subtitle: MyGamingTips centralizes videos, guides and useful links, organized by game. Each piece of content is analyzed by AI then verified by a human to guarantee you reliable, quality information.
hero.trust_verified: Content analyzed by AI, then verified by a human

features.title: Built to find fast, without drowning.
features.intro: It all starts from a simple idea: the right content already exists. It's just buried under algorithmic noise.
features.f1_desc: Not an algorithm, humans. Every piece of content is selected and validated to earn its place.
features.f2_desc: Every game has a finite number of useful contents. You leave satisfied, never captive to a feed.
features.f3_desc: Find your content in one tap, sort it, organize it your way, across multiple sessions.
features.f4_desc: The living arcade at night, the readable retreat by day. The theme follows your style, not the other way around.
features.f5_desc: Find content in your language. And if nothing exists yet, English always has you covered.
features.f6_desc: Local cache, background sync. The app opens before you've finished thinking about it.

mobile.title: Designed for short sessions.
mobile.intro: Between two matches, on the commute, during a download. A few taps, the right content, close.
mobile.home_caption: All your tips, guides and tricks in one place. Instant startup.
mobile.explore_caption: Discover the most popular games, shared by the community, sorted and verified.
mobile.mygames_caption: Your personalized list, one tap away.
mobile.playlist_caption: Find your content without searching. Sort, organize your way.
mobile.playlist_genre_caption: Organize your content by genre, to vary your gaming sessions.
mobile.abo_caption: Get MyGamingTips Plus and unlock My Playlist, 3 exclusive wallpapers and the dedicated Windows app.
mobile.playlist_game_caption: All your content grouped by game, for an ever-clearer organization.
mobile.playlist_bygame_caption: Always clearer organization, game by game.
mobile.profile_caption: Customize your setup image and discover the contributor of the month.

windows.title: The ad-free overlay video player.
windows.intro: Watch your favorite guides overlaid while you play. No ads, no interruptions, ever.
windows.b1: Overlay playback on top of your game
windows.b3: All your content synced with mobile
windows.demo_hint: Click to launch the overlay video
windows.home_caption: All the power of MyGamingTips on the big screen.
windows.overlay_caption: Watch your favorite guides overlaid while you play. No ads, no interruptions.
windows.languages_caption: Find content in your language. And if nothing exists yet, English always has you covered.
windows.playlist_game_caption: All your content grouped by game.
windows.playlist_genre_caption: Another way to organize your library.

community.title: Verified, first by an AI. Soon by you.
community.intro: Content isn't served by a blind algorithm. Today, a super-active AI validates every piece — over 3,000 already. Tomorrow, the human community takes over.
community.month_desc: For now, a super-active AI feeds and validates the database — over 3,000 contents already validated. But the app is designed to live by and for its community: eventually, players will contribute, sort and keep every game alive.
community.contrib_desc: Share your best finds directly from your favorite app via the Share function to MyGamingTips. Each month, the top 3 contributors receive a one-month Premium subscription — ranking resets every month so everyone gets a chance.

personalize.title: The living arcade at night. The readable retreat by day.
personalize.intro: Toggle the site theme live. That's exactly what the app does: a vibrant night mode where neon makes sense, and a readable day mode in full sunlight.
personalize.caption: The living arcade at night, the readable retreat by day. It's your style.

plus.title: Upgrade to MyGamingTips Plus
plus.subtitle: The app stays free. The My Playlist menu becomes Plus.
plus.b1_desc: Organize, sort and find all your content without searching (the only menu reserved for Plus).
plus.b2_desc: Customize the app with 3 premium wallpapers.
plus.b3_desc: Find all your content on Windows PC, synced with your mobile.

promo.subtitle: Videos, links and tips for Aion 2, Diablo 4, Star Citizen and more.
promo.alt: Screenshot of the MyGamingTips app — your gaming guides, sorted and verified.

download.title: Free. Ad-free. No account required.
download.intro: MyGamingTips is free for everyone, on mobile and Windows.
download.windows_req: Windows 10 or higher · 150 MB of space
download.microcopy: No ads. No account required. No excessive tracking.
